narrative:
Virgil van Dijk is a dominant Centre-Back for the Kingdom of the Netherlands. His overall rating of 7.38/10 places him among the top 1% of centre-backs at this tournament. This rating reflects both his club form, which accounts for 73% of the score, and his current World Cup performances.

His 6.923 clearances per 90 minutes at this World Cup highlight his vital defensive presence. Remarkably, he also contributes offensively with 0.231 goals and 0.231 assists per 90 minutes. However, his expected goals and assists per 90 minutes are significantly lower at 0.022 and 0.03 respectively, suggesting an overperformance in front of goal during this tournament.

Van Dijk is clearly a foundational pillar for the Kingdom of the Netherlands, anchoring their defense and unexpectedly boosting their attack. Scouts should monitor whether his high offensive output, particularly his goals and assists, can be sustained given his low expected metrics. His continued influence in clearances and interceptions will be key in their progression through the tournament.
